name: Waffles with Mocha Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mocha mix with softened cream of wheat.
2. Add melted butter, vanilla, sugar, and yogurt to the mixture.
3. Stir in the egg and dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Pour batter into a preheated waffle iron and cook until golden brown.
5. Makes 3 round Belgium-style waffles.
